scripts.build:test-deps: pnpm --filter @tyrum/contracts build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-policy build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/transport-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/node-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/cli-utils build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/operator-app build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/operator-ui build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-node-control build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-execution build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-agent build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-workboard build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/desktop-node build
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tyrum/desktop-node build && pnpm build:main && pnpm build:preload && pnpm build:renderer
scripts.build:gateway: pnpm --filter @tyrum/contracts build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-policy build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/cli-utils build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/node-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-node-control build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-execution build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-agent build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-workboard build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/gateway build && node ./scripts/stage-gateway-bin.mjs
scripts.dist: pnpm build:gateway && pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
